class.name: PolygonTriangulationGodot
class.brief_description: Godot-friendly interface to the DMWT 3D polygon triangulator with Godot array output.

method.name: clear_cache
method.description: Discards cached vertices, indices, and normals so the next call to [method triangulate] recomputes them.

method.name: create
method.description: Creates a [PolygonTriangulationGodot] from a boundary point array. [param normals] is optional; when omitted, per-point normals are estimated from the local curve geometry. [param points] must have at least three entries.

method.name: create_planar
method.description: Creates a [PolygonTriangulationGodot] with an explicit set of degenerate (perturbed) points alongside the original boundary. The degenerate set helps the Delaunay stage avoid degenerate configurations when boundary points are nearly co-planar.

method.name: enable_dot_output
method.description: Enables or disables the dot-product heuristic in the underlying DMWT solver. See [method PolygonTriangulation.set_dot].

method.name: get_indices
method.description: Returns triangle indices as a flat array of vertex index triples. Empty until [method triangulate] succeeds.

method.name: get_mesh
method.description: Builds and returns an [ArrayMesh] from the triangulation result. When [param smooth] is [code]true[/code], per-vertex normals are computed. [param subdivisions] subdivides each triangle [param subdivisions] times. [param laplacian_iterations] runs that many Laplacian smoothing passes on the output.

method.name: get_normals
method.description: Returns per-vertex normals from the last [method triangulate] call. Empty if no result is cached.

method.name: get_optimal_cost
method.description: Returns the total DMWT objective cost of the current triangulation. Lower values indicate a triangulation closer to the specified cost weights.

method.name: get_statistics
method.description: Returns solver statistics with keys [code]"triangles"[/code] ([int]), [code]"vertices"[/code] ([int]), [code]"optimal_cost"[/code] ([float]), and [code]"early_stop"[/code] ([bool]).

method.name: get_triangle_count
method.description: Returns the number of output triangles.

method.name: get_vertex_count
method.description: Returns the number of output vertices. This may exceed the boundary point count when the solver inserts interior points.

method.name: get_vertices
method.description: Returns output vertex positions. Empty until [method triangulate] succeeds.

method.name: preprocess
method.description: Runs the DMWT preprocessing stage and returns [code]true[/code] on success. Must be called before [method triangulate].

method.name: set_cost_weights
method.description: Sets the five DMWT cost weights. See [method PolygonTriangulation.set_weights] for the definition of each term. The defaults weight only dihedral angle ([param edge] = 1), which produces smooth surfaces for sketched boundaries.

method.name: set_optimization_rounds
method.description: Sets the number of optimisation rounds. See [method PolygonTriangulation.set_round].

method.name: set_point_limit
method.description: Caps the number of boundary points passed to the solver. See [method PolygonTriangulation.set_point_limit].

method.name: triangulate
method.description: Runs the DMWT solver and caches the result. Returns [code]true[/code] on success. Call [method preprocess] first. Subsequent calls to [method get_vertices], [method get_indices], and [method get_mesh] return the cached result until [method clear_cache] is called.
